summary: Iteration 24: CRM Lead Management, 3 Scenario Generator, Follow-up Email, Improved PDF - All 4 new features tested. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: ScenarioCompare component working, SubsidyModule 5-step flow working, contact form present. All CRM APIs functional.
seed_data_creation: None - CRM uses in-memory store with Supabase backup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested 4 new CRM features. All backend APIs working: POST /api/crm/leads (lead creation with score 0-100), GET /api/crm/leads (list sorted by created_at desc), POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/follow-up (generates HTML email), POST /api/crm/follow-up/generate (email without saving lead), POST /api/crm/scenarios/generate (3 scenarios via AI or fallback). Frontend: ScenarioCompare in Step5Quote shows 'Genereer 3 scenario's' button and displays Budget/Standaard/Premium cards. SubsidyModule has contact form (naam, email, telefoon, bedrijf) at bottom of results view. Lead scoring: email(20)+telefoon(15)+bedrijf(10)+project(10)+subsidie_score(15)+hoog_kans(20)+high_inv(10)=100 max.

backend_apis: POST /api/crm/leads - creates lead with lead_score calculation (0-100)
GET /api/crm/leads - returns list sorted by created_at desc
POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/follow-up - generates personalized follow-up email HTML
POST /api/crm/follow-up/generate - generates email from data without saving lead
Lead score calculation: email=20, telefoon=15, bedrijf=10, project=10, subsidie_score=15, hoog_kans=20, high_inv=10
Follow-up email contains RECRA branding, score, subsidie_range, and CTA
frontend_ui: Recreatie flow Step 5: ScenarioCompare component visible with 'Genereer 3 scenario's' button
Clicking generate button creates 3 scenario cards (Budget, Standaard, Premium)
Scenario cards show investering, lease_maand, terugverdientijd_maanden
Scenario cards expandable with producten and voordelen lists
SubsidyModule: 5-step intake form (Organisatie, Project, Financieel, Impact, Versterkers)
SubsidyModule results: shows score, kans label, subsidie_range, breakdown
SubsidyModule results: contact form with naam, email, telefoon, bedrijf inputs
SubsidyModule results: 'Laat RECRA dit voor je regelen' save button
Improved PDF endpoint returns HTML with RECRA + Pleisureworld branding

api_test_results.crm_leads_list: PASS - Returns array sorted by created_at desc
api_test_results.crm_follow_up_lead: PASS - Returns email_html, subject, to, naam
api_test_results.crm_scenarios_generate: PASS - Returns 3 scenarios with AI or fallback
